evidence.text: Interactive Sandboxes for AI Agent Evaluations & Reinforcement Learning on 3rd party APIs (Slack, Linear, Box, gCalendar) # Agent Diff **Interactive environments for evaluating AI agents & RL training on replicas of 3rd party APIs like Linear or Slack.** Run it locally (or deploy it). Agents call sandboxed replicas of APIs that behave like the real ones, and you get deterministic diffs of every state change — no external services, no side effects, no rate limits.
